ab: paqaluwaap na itaal i tinqalangan i yaba’ mu.
ch: 我的爸爸是部落的獵人。
en: My dad is a hunter of the tribe.

ab: cu ulaqi’ cu na’ ga, umubu’ cu takis ru mahangal na patus humakay i mahantan yaba’ ki mama’.
ch: 我小的時候，爸爸和叔叔會在晚上出門，帶著獵刀和獵槍。
en: When I was little, my dad and uncle would go out at night with hunting knives and guns.

ab: saaluwan lga, awni nha’ rasan lku qinaluwaap nha’ ka qaqasinu.
ch: 天亮時，他們就會帶著獵到的獵物回來。
en: At daybreak, they returned with their prey.

ab: mahananu’ ga bawwak na lahulahu, mahananu’ ga apit, iy makiya a gilaqung uwi.
ch: 有時候是山豬、有時候是飛鼠，偶爾也會有雉雞。
en: Sometimes it was a boar, sometimes a flying squirrel, and occasionally a pheasant.

ab: gayhun nha’ i sugagay gawng ru siqasu kahabaag cku itaal i tiqalangan.
ch: 他們會在村口叉路的溪邊將獵物分分解切好後，分享給部落族人。
en: They would divide the prey at the entrance of the village and share it with the tribe.

ab: mamati’ mi pakibugan i yaba’ mha paglu ci musa’ qumaluwaap uwi.
ch: 我每次都會吵著爸爸，我也要跟著去打獵。
en: Every time I quarreled with my father, I wanted to go hunting with my father.

ab: kumaal yaba’ mha rahuwal kuwing lga rarasun cu niya’.
ch: 爸爸說等我長大了他再帶我一起去。
en: Dad said that he would take me with me when I grew up.

ab: baaq uwi kabalay cu sasiyahing cu qaqasinu ku mamaliku i tinqalangan, kabalay cu tatiruweq ca wariyung, tatiruweq ca kukuy.
ch: 部落的男人也會用陷阱抓獵物，製作套頸或套腳陷阱。
en: The men of the tribe also trap their prey, making head-hold traps and leg-hold traps.

ab: baaq i puquluwang i yaba’, kumaal i yaba’ mha, tatiruweq cu gilaqung ku hani, asiki nabalbalayqun mitaal ku tuqi na qasinu, kakbahneq, sukuun cku hahakayan na qasinu ku quluwang.
ch: 我的爸爸很會製作套索陷阱，爸爸說，這是用來捕抓雉雞的，我們要仔細觀察獵物的腳印，陷阱要放在獵物走的路上。
en: My dad is very good at making lasso traps. Dad said that this is used to catch pheasants. We have to carefully observe the footprints of the prey, and the traps should be placed on the path of the prey.

ab: naki ti ini’ kanga’ gumlu kinku nanabakis musa’ i qumaluwaap mha cu ru’, makaruux ci makibaq kabalay cu sasiyahing cu qbuqbux kariariax, ini’ kaingasu ru’ tiruweq cubalay lku sinku’ mu.
ch: 為了可以趕快和大人一起去打獵，我每天練習製作陷阱，很快地我的陷阱就真的可以抓到獵物了。
en: In order to go hunting with adults as soon as possible, I practiced making traps every day, and soon my traps can really catch prey.

ab: talan ni yaba’ ru kalun cu niya’ mha pakacapaang kuwing na patqaqasinu inga’’
ch: 爸爸看到後對我說我以後一定會是很厲害的獵人。
en: Dad saw it and told me that I will be a very good hunter in the future.

ab: rahuwal ci la kahani, mapanga’ ci cu tawnux ru saliy mu, gumlu ci yaba’ musa’ qumaluwaap la.
ch: 現在我長大了，我背起我的弓和箭矢，跟著爸爸一起去打獵。
en: Now that I have grown up, I carry my bow and arrows and go hunting with my father.

ab: muwah tinqalangan ga, siqasu kahabaag ku tiniruwrq cku qutux cu glu.
ch: 回部落時，將獵物和族人們分享。
en: When returning to the village, share the hunted prey with the tribe.

ab: kumaal yaba’ mha, asi ta’ ki situbun ku huway na nanabakis, bayqan ta’ niya’ cu tiniruweq ka payux.
ch: 爸爸說，我們要感謝祖靈賜福，讓我們有很多獵物收穫。
en: Dad said, we want to thank the ancestors for their blessings, so that we have a lot of prey to harvest.
